task_name: BYOK Best Practices for AI Inference
notes: Exceptional guide. Criterion 1: Envelope encryption, KMS, transmission security, and in-memory handling covered rigorously with working Python code. Criterion 2: Multiple practical code examples (FastAPI validation, structlog redaction, IAM policy JSON), real deployment patterns, and hybrid models. Criterion 3: All major providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Vertex AI, Bedrock) covered accurately with subtle details (Anthropic custom header, Bedrock cross-account assume-role, Vertex regions). Criterion 4: All 7 topics substantively addressed, ~5800 words, clear structure with executive summary and launch checklist. Criterion 5: 10 concrete pitfalls (logging middleware leaks, CORS fallacy, rate-limit confusion, SSRF via base URL, double-charging) and nuanced trade-off analysis. Minor deductions: incident-response playbook could be more explicitly templated (mentioned but not detailed); zero-knowledge architectures mentioned but not deeply explored. Overall, this is a production-ready reference document suitable for immediate team adoption.
